APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KELSEY L. THWAITS, Esq. of Parker, Simon, Kokolis & Brown, LLP (Tel: 707-210-3020) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LCS CAPITAL, LLC's Motion For Order Transferring Venue.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

LCS Capital, LLC's unopposed "motion for order transferring venue" to Contra Costa County Superior Court is granted. LCS Capital shall pay the transfer costs.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
